title: cyperus submacropus
intro: Cyperus submacropus, also known as umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with its roots and rhizomes containing a compound called isatin, which has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus submacropus include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. In herbal preparations, Cyperus submacropus is often made into a decoction or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
